# Support for Boarddy

Need help with Boarddy? Here are the best ways to get support, find documentation, and resolve issues.

## 🔍 Self-Help & Documentation

* **README**: Check the main [README.md](../README.md) for quick setup and command line usage.
* **Wiki / Documentation**: (Link to GitHub Wiki or official docs site once launched).
* **Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)**: Look through common inquiries in [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/boarddy-io/boarddy/discussions).

---

## 💬 Community Support

For general usage questions, configuration tips, and discussing keyboard workflows:
* **GitHub Discussions**: The primary hub for the Boarddy community.
  * Use the [Discussions Tab](https://github.com/boarddy-io/boarddy/discussions) to ask questions, share templates, and show off your productivity setups.
  * Check the **Showcase** category for inspiration.

---

## 🐛 Bug Reporting & Feature Requests

If you encounter technical issues or wish to suggest improvements:
* **Bug Reports**: Open an issue using the [Bug Report Template](https://github.com/boarddy-io/boarddy/issues/new?template=bug_report.md).
* **Performance Issues**: Open an issue using the [Performance Issue Template](https://github.com/boarddy-io/boarddy/issues/new?template=performance_issue.md) if you experience high CPU, memory, or lag.
* **Feature Requests**: Submit features via [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/boarddy-io/boarddy/discussions) in the **Feature Requests** category.

---

## 💼 Commercial & Enterprise Support

Boarddy is built and backed by **Huna Inc.** If you require assistance regarding commercial licenses, volume purchasing, or enterprise deployment:
* **Email Support**: Reach out directly to [support@huna.io](mailto:support@huna.io).
* **Enterprise Licensing**: Contact [licensing@huna.io](mailto:licensing@huna.io).

---

## ⚠️ Security Vulnerabilities

If you discover a security-related issue, please **do not** file a public issue. Follow our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md) to report it privately to [security@huna.io](mailto:security@huna.io).
